name: HitMarker
author: Flaze
description: Displays a visual hitmarker in the center of your screen whenever you successfully damage an enemy. The hitmarker appears for 0.5 seconds with smooth fade-in and fade-out animations. Works with all weapons including arrows, spears, and melee attacks.

modSettings.name: customImagePath
modSettings.tooltip: Enter the full path to a PNG file (e.g., C:\Users\YourName\Pictures\hitmarker.png). Leave empty to use default hitmarker.

modSettings.name: loadCustomImage
modSettings.tooltip: Click to load the image from the path above

modSettings.name: resetToDefault
modSettings.tooltip: Click to restore the default hitmarker image
